mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_message (from_user_id, to_user_id, content) VALUES (#{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_message WHERE (from_user_id = #{userId} AND to_user_id = #{otherId}) OR (from_user_id = #{otherId} AND to_user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT m.other_id AS otherId, u.nickname AS otherName, u.avatar AS otherAvatar, lm.content AS lastContent, lm.create_time AS lastTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_message x WHERE x.to_user_id = #{userId} AND x.from_user_id = m.other_id AND x.is_read = 0) AS unread FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN from_user_id = #{userId} THEN to_user_id ELSE from_user_id END AS other_id, MAX(id) AS last_id FROM t_message WHERE from_user_id = #{userId} OR to_user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY other_id ) m JOIN t_message lm ON lm.id = m.last_id JOIN t_user u ON u.id = m.other_id ORDER BY lm.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_message WHERE to_user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE t_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE to_user_id = #{userId} AND from_user_id = #{otherId} AND is_read = 0
